confirm_delete_with_refs: This skill is currently used by <bold>{{count}} app(s)</bold>. After deletion, those apps <bold>will no longer be able to call it</bold>. Consider unlinking or backing up the configuration first.
copy_skill_confirm: The system will create a skill with the same configuration for you, but the permissions will not be copied. Please confirm!
create_skill_desc: Tell AI your requirements and create or optimize Skills through natural language.
empty_state_tip:
Tell AI how to modify the Skill,
or let AI run the Skill to see the effect
import_existing_skill_desc: Import common Skills from outside directly into the platform. Supports .zip format.
import_skill_max_size_tip: Upload up to {{maxCount}} file at a time, max file size: {{maxSize}}
move_skill_hint: After moving, the selected skill/folder will inherit the permission settings of the new folder.
no_current_version: No available Skill version yet. Recreate or import the Skill before editing.
no_skills: You don't have any skills yet
permission.des.manage: Can manage Agent Skill and collaborators
related_apps_hidden: {{count}} more app(s) hidden due to permissions
sandbox_auto_enabled_for_skill: Skills depend on the virtual machine runtime. Virtual machine has been enabled for you.
sandbox_disable_blocked_toast: Skills depend on the virtual machine runtime. This Agent has Skills configured. Remove all Skills before turning off the virtual machine.
sandbox_operation_plan_not_supported_con: Skill operations depend on the virtual machine runtime. The current plan does not support virtual machine features. Upgrade your plan to continue.
sandbox_operation_system_not_configured_: Skill operations depend on the virtual machine runtime. The current system has not configured a virtual machine, so related features are temporarily unavailable. Contact an administrator to configure it.
sandbox_plan_not_supported_title: Plan does not support this feature
sandbox_runtime_upgrade_archived: Outdated virtual machine is ready. Rebuilding runtime...
sandbox_runtime_upgrade_desc:
It is detected that the current virtual machine environment has a new version and needs to be upgraded before it can be used normally. 
Upgrading the version will not affect the files in the workspace, but requires reinstalling dependent packages.
sandbox_skill_plan_not_supported_content: Skills depend on the virtual machine runtime. The current plan does not support virtual machine features. Upgrade your plan to continue.
sandbox_skill_system_not_configured_toas: Skills depend on the virtual machine runtime. The current system has not configured a virtual machine, so related features are temporarily unavailable. Contact an administrator to configure it.
sandbox_skill_unavailable_toast: Skills depend on the virtual machine runtime. This Agent has Skills configured. Remove all Skills before turning off the virtual machine.
sandbox_system_not_configured_toast: The current system has not configured a virtual machine, so related features are temporarily unavailable. Contact an administrator to configure it.
skill_intro_placeholder: Describe use cases and access paths
skill_select_limit_tip: Reached the limit of 100 associated Skills per app
